burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to injuries and lost productivity
burden.mortalityRate: Low overall; higher when cardiac causes

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: History and exam, orthostatic BP, ECG; targeted testing when indicated

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; evaluated in emergency/primary care
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; limited access to advanced cardiac evaluation

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ECG access varies; advanced testing mainly in urban centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying cause; hydration and medication review; pacemaker for conduction disease
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited EMS coverage and diagnostic resources in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Expanding emergency care services and cardiology capacity
